item.title: LEGO City Cargo Train Toys for Kids Boys 7 Girls Aged 6 plus Years Old Remote Control Set Battery Powered Engine with Bluetooth Connection 3 Wagons and Tracks 60198
item.description: You can find LEGO City Cargo Train Toys for Kids Boys 7 Girls Aged 6 plus Years Old Remote Control Set Battery Powered Engine with Bluetooth Connection 3 Wagons and Tracks 60198 with a discount here: ℹ️: Includes 6 LEGO City minifigures: 4 train workers, a security officer and a crook for imaginative role-play with this LEGO train set for kids Includes a motorized engine with 10-speed Bluetooth remote control, pantograph on the opening roof, and driver’s cabin with control panel Also includes a control center with signal lights, toy train tracks with 16 curved rails, 16 straight rails and a railroad switch with lever LEGO City Train toys and sets with battery powered up motors (batteries not included) are a first-class Christmas or Birthday gifts for kids, boys and girls Kids can push the lever on the LEGO train track switch to drive the remote control train toy to a different track for loading or unloading The Cargo Train set for kids aged 6+ years old features a battery powered train toy with 4 cars, plus a control centre, armoured truck and forklift toys 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Harry Potter building toy for kids aged 9+ features a Hogwarts castle Astronomy Tower model, 8 minifigures and loads of magical fun Great for role play; kids can search the sky with the telescope, check the mandrakes in the greenhouse, chill in the Ravenclaw dorm or join Slughorns party This LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle buildable toy makes a magical birthday gift for a son or daughter, or a surprise toy treat or boys and girls aged 9+, and all kids who love the Wizarding World adventures Kids can build the multi-level LEGO Hogwarts Castle Astronomy Tower and explore all it has to offer while recreating scenes from the Harry Potter movies Includes LEGO Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Ron Weasley, Luna Lovegood, Neville Longbottom, Draco Malfoy, Lavender Brown and Professor Slughorn minifgures Also includes a toy Hedwig the owl figure, plus accessories like letters, wands, book of potions, broomstick, cakes, wine glasses, lanterns, torches and candles 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Creator 3in1 set, featuring a pirate ship toy, makes a great birthday gift for a son or daughter, or Christmas present for swashbuckling kids, boys and girls aged 9+ years old This LEGO Creator set for aspiring pirates features 3 models in 1: a classic Pirate Ship toy, rustic Pirates’ Inn and mysterious Skull Island On the spooky island, a handle allows kids to open and close the skull, or they can hide the gold in the Pirate Inn’s secret hidey-hole Includes 2 pirate minifigures in full costume with sabres, 1 deckhand sailor plus buildable shark and bird figures and a skeleton figure The pirate ship toy features an opening roof and wall to access the cabin, a foretop to keep watch for targets and rotating cannons for more fun Accessories include a map, torch, pistol, treasure chest, telescope, goblets, 2 sabres and many more details, like flags, barrels and lanterns 🛒 Check the deal!
